titleStmt.title: SII 5.412: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 412. (A.R. No. 123 of 1894). ON THE OUTSIDE OF THE EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE; RIGHT OF ENTRANCE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūviṉkiḻatti mevi viṟṟiruppa metiṉimātu nitiyiṟ puṇara vayappormaṭantai [ja]yappuyat tiruppa mākkalai
maṭantai vākkiṉil viḷaṅka ticai Irunāṉkum micainilā veṟippa maṟaineṟi vaḷara maṉuneṟi tikaḻa Aṟaneṟic camaiyaṅka ḷāṟun taḻaippa
k kāṉaveṅkayaiy villuṭaṉ turantu mīṉaṅ kaṉakācalattu viṟṟiruppa Eṇkiri cūḻnta Eḻkaṭa leḻpoḻil veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟa ceṅkol na
ṭappak koṭuṅkali naṭuṅki neṭumpilat toḻippa villavar cempiyar virāṭar varāṭavar pallavar tiṟaiyuṭaṉ muṟaimuṟai paṇiya virunemiyaḷavum O
runemi yoṅka Iṉṉamutākiya viyalicaināṭaka maṉṉi vaḷara maṇimuṭi cūṭi viḷaṅkiya vira[ siṁ hāsa] ṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkoccaṭaiyapaṉma
rāṉa tri[ bhu vaṉa] ccakra varttikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉmuṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu miṉanāyaṟṟu nālāntiyatiyum Aparapakṣa ttu daśa
miyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūrāṭattu nāḷ kiḻvempanāṭṭu [devadā] ṉabrahmade yam tirunelveliyāṉa kulacekaracaturvvedi maṅkalattu ma [hā]
sabhai yom Ivūr paṭipāṇipaḷḷīyāḻvāṉāṉa Uṭaiyār kulaśekha rakkāṭuveṭṭikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta bhūmi yāvatu Ivūr caṅ
karanārāyaṇap perumpilāṟṟukku teṟku pattāṅkaṇṇāṟṟum patiṉoṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu paṉṉiraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟum paḷḷikoṇṭāṉ vāykkāā
lukku teṟkku mutal kaṇṇāṟṟu vatikku meṟku Irupattoṉṟāñcey kuṟaiyum Irupattiraṇṭāñcey kuṟaiyum Irupattumūṉṟāñcey ku
ṟaiyum melaivāykkālukku meṟku tiṭaltaricu nilam �4 Inila mumāvaraikku perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻellai melaivāykkālukku
meṟku teṉṉellai marutūr tattaṉṉavaratāṉaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa purapaṇṇaikku vaṭakkum melellai kulacekarappererik karaiyi
l Ēṟappokiṟa peruvaḻikku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai tirukkaṭavūr śrīkṛṣṇa ṉ tiruveṇkāṭaṉperilum tirukkuṭamukkil nārāyaṇa
ṉ tiruveṇkāṭaṉperilum paḻampaṭṭolaiyil Eṭuttukkiṭantatu perumpaṟṟappuliyūr cūriyatevaṉ Ampalattāṭi Uṉa
viranārāyaṇaerikku teṟku mivvicainta perunāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nila mummāvaraiyum paḷḷikoṇṭāṉvā
ykkālukku teṟku paṉṉiraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu vatikku meṟku Irupattiraṇṭāñ cey kuṟaiyum Irupattumuṉṟāñ cey kuṟaiyu
m melai vāykkālukku meṟku kulacekarappereri karaikku kiḻakku paḻampaṭṭolaiyil Araṅkaṉ centanperil Eṭuttukiṭanta nila
morumā nikki nikki nila morumāvum Āka nila nāṉmāvaraiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttom mahāsahai yom. Uṭaiyār kulacekarakkāṭu
veṭṭikaḷukku Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Inilattukku vilai niśca yitta Āccu 9 Accu Oṉpatukku Inilam muṉpu paṟṟuniṉṟa maṇalūr so
miśvara ṉ cantiraśekharabha ṭṭaṉukkum tirukkuṭamukkil śrīkaiyilāsamuṭaiyāṉa paṟpanābha ṉukkum tirukkaṭavūr nakkaṉ caṅkaranā
rāyaṇaṉukkum perumpaṟṟappuliyūr cūriyatevaṉ Ampalattāṭikkum Ivaccu Oṉpatu Ippaṭi nerākak kuṭuttu Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭu
tta Innilattukku Ituve vilaiōlaiyum poruṭcelavolaiyu māvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu vilaimāvaṟutip poruṭ
celavolai kāṭṭavum kāṇavuṅ kaṭavataṉṟi vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta Innilam 6 la
raiyum Ivar tamaiyaṉār pakavatiyāḻvāṉāṉa de var kaṇṭiyade var piṟantanāḷ cittiraiyile māsa ttu Orunāḷ ciṟappāka Uṭaiyār
tirunelveliuṭaiyārai Ivar Amutuceyvippatāṉa Aṉavaratatāṉaṉāl Arici kalattukku Inilattāl vanta Iṟai kuṭimai
Uḻutāṉkuṭi Uṭpaṭa maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Ācandratāram tavirntu Ippaṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭivippārākavum
Ippaṭi sammadi ttu pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom mahāsabhai yom .uṭaiyār kulaśekhara k kāṭuveṭṭikaḷukku Ippaṭikku
Ivai perumeyalūr vighneśvara ṉ ṣrivallabha ṉeḻuttu Ivai tirukkoṭṭiyūr tevaṉ cuntarattoḷuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu I
vai Uyyavantā ṉeḻuttu Ivai maṇa lūr nā rā yaṇaṉ ciṅkappirā ṉeḻuttu Ivai tirukkaṭavūr nakkaṉ caṅkaranārā yaṇa ṉeḻuttu I
vai perumeyalūr caṅkaranārā yaṇaṉ Āvaṟsakhāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai koṭṭaiyūr śrīkaiyilāsauṭaiyāṉ parameśvara ṉeḻuttu Ivai tiru
kkuṭamukkil Āvaṟsakhā yaṉ nakka ṉeḻuttu Ivai koṭṭaiyūr kaḷḷappirāṉ kariyamāl Eḻuttu Ivai perumpaṟṟappuliyūr cūriya
tevaṉ Ampalattāṭi Eḻuttu Ivai tirukkuṭamukkil Āvaṟ[sa]kāyaṉ śrīkṛṣṇa ṉeḻuttu Ivai sammasara vāriyam tirukkuṭamukkil
tiruveṇkāṭaṉ śrīvāsude va ṉeḻuttu Ivai maṇalūr cantiracekaraṉ so mi[ śvarabha ṭ] ṭa so mayāji Eḻuttu Ivai Ātaṉūr paṟpaṉāpa
ṉ śrīkṛṣṇabhaṭṭaso mayaāji Eḻuttu tirukkaṭavūr kaṇṇaṅkobhaṭṭaso- mayāji Eḻuttu tirukkaṭavūr kovaṉ tirumāliruñcolaibhaṭṭas
o mayāji Eḻuttu Ivai maṇalūr comiśvara ṉ cantiracekarabhaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai koṭṭaiyūr kariyamāl nārāyaṇa ṉeḻut
tu Ivai koṭṭaiyūr teyvaccilaiyāṉ caṅkaranārāyaṇa vai � nārā yaṇavā ṉeḻuttu Ivai perumeyalū
ṉ pālai Eḻuttu Ivai koṭṭaiyūr tiruvikkiramaṉ caṅkara ddhyāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai koṭṭaiyūr nārā yaṇaṉ varantaruvāṉ
vūr poṉṉa[ṉ śrī]kṛṛṣṇa ṉeḻuttu Ivai marutūr jātavetaṉ Ārāvamuta ṉeḻuttu Ivai perumeyalūr Uyyavantāṉ caṅkaranā
Ātaṉūr śrīkirukṛṣṇa ṉ paṟpaṉābha ṉeḻuttu Ivai tirukkaṭavūr kovaṉ nārā yaṇa ṉeḻuttu Ivai koṭṭaiyūr centāmarai
ṉaḻuttu Ivai Acuvu rāmade vaṉ kotaiyāḻvāṉbhaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai koṭṭaiyūr śrīkaiyilā[samuṭ]aiyāṉ A
Ivai perumeyalūr tiruvirāmiśva raṉ comāci Eḻuttu Ivai tirukkaṭavūr tirunilakaṇṭaṉ Āvaṟsakhāya ṉeḻuttu I�
rāmaṉ Āvaṟ[sakā]ya ṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.412 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
